carry_square_fixture_to_cnc_opening.query: a worker carries a square metal fixture with an orange face and central hole in the right hand while walking to the open CNC machine

position_square_fixture_inside_cnc.query: a worker presses a square metal fixture against the vertical mounting area inside the CNC machine and adjusts its position with the right hand

press_illuminated_orange_control.query: a worker presses the illuminated orange round button on the CNC machine control panel with the left hand

press_lower_right_silver_control.query: a worker presses the silver round button at the lower-right of the CNC machine control panel with the left hand

close_cnc_sliding_door.query: a worker grips the black vertical handle of the CNC machine with the left hand and closes the sliding door

move_orange_square_fixture_on_table.query: a worker lifts an orange square metal fixture from the worktable with the right hand, moves it to the adjacent position, and sets it down
